minimum.cpu: Intel Core i5-2500K (4 * 3300) AMD Phenom II X4 965 (4 * 3400) or equivalent
minimum.gpu: GeForce GTX 1050 (2048 MB) / Radeon RX 550 (4096 MB)

recommended.cpu: Intel Core i7-6700K (4 * 4000) or AMD Ryzen 5 1500X (4 * 3500) or equivalent
recommended.gpu: GeForce GTX 970 (4096 MB) or Radeon RX 5700 (8192 MB)
